response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on geospatial applications (e.g., GISCollective), but lacks direct commercial experience in C++/Rust for routing/tiling pipelines. His background in distributed systems, performance optimization, and geospatial data aligns partially with the role, though his recent work skews toward TypeScript and AI tooling.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with open-source contributions in geodata platforms.
Proven track record in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Sociomantic, DLang micro-services).
Strong problem-solving and experimentation mindset, evidenced by workshops and TDD/functional programming advocacy.
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience (critical for this role).
No explicit experience with routing data pipelines or navigation systems (e.g., traffic integration, routing tiles).
Recent roles focus on AI tooling and full-stack development, diverging from the role's core technical requirements.
